creator: pfgshield-freebsd@yahoo.com
text:
I am now the maintainer of math/vtk (PR 126962). Here is an updated patch:

- Update vtk5 to version 5.0.4
- Mangled Mesa hasn't been committed and in any case I would prefer to use OSMesa once it's available, so the Mangled Mesa option will be OFF by default.
- fix the pkg-plist for the NOPORTDOCS case reported by QAT@freebsd.org to previous maintainer.
